inputIdea: A tool for study members to record weekly learning, questions, and next actions.

prototypeIntent.primaryHypothesis: Study members will record weekly learning more consistently if the record flow takes less than three minutes.
prototypeIntent.minimumValidationMethod: Interactive web prototype with realistic dummy weekly study records.

confirmed: The prototype is for a team study group.
The first version focuses on record creation, list review, detail review, and action item checks.
The prototype can use realistic dummy data.
Actual authentication and sharing links are out of scope.
clarificationQuestions: Is this for personal records or team sharing?
What must be included in each record?
Which flow should the first prototype validate?

plannedQuestions.text: When was the most recent time you forgot to record weekly study learning?
Walk me through that specific study day from beginning to end.
While using this prototype, where did you hesitate?

items.text: The list should show action item completion status.
The record form feels short enough for weekly use.
